sentences.target: Le cuisinier prépare nos pizzas ce soir.
sentences.reading: /lə kɥi.zi.nje pʁe.paʁ no pid.za sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Le cuisinier prépare nos pizzas ce soir.
translations.ipa: /lə kɥi.zi.nje pʁe.paʁ no pid.za sə swaʁ/
translations.en: The cook is making our pizzas tonight.
translations.es: El cocinero prepara nuestras pizzas esta noche.
translations.de: Der Koch macht heute Abend unsere Pizzen.
translations.it: Il cuoco prepara le nostre pizze stasera.
translations.ko: 요리사가 오늘 밤 우리 피자를 만들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 厨师今晚要做我们的披萨。
translations.yue: 廚師今晚會整我哋嘅披薩。
translations.ru: Повар сегодня вечером готовит наши пиццы.
translations.pt: O cozinheiro vai preparar as nossas pizzas esta noite.
translations.he: הטבח מכין את הפיצות שלנו הערב.
translations.vi: Đầu bếp sẽ làm pizza cho chúng tôi tối nay.
translations.nl: De kok maakt vanavond onze pizza's.
translations.uk: Кухар сьогодні ввечері готує наші піци.
translations.hu: A szakács ma este elkészíti a pizzáinkat.
translations.hi: रसोइया आज रात हमारे पिज़ा बनाएगा.
translations.pl: Kucharz przygotuje dziś wieczorem nasze pizze.
translations.el: Ο μάγειρας ετοιμάζει απόψε τις πίτσες μας.
translations.nb: Kokken lager pizzaene våre i kveld.
translations.id: Koki akan membuat pizza kami malam ini.
translations.ro: Bucătarul pregătește pizza pentru noi diseară.
translations.cs: Kuchař dnes večer připraví naše pizzy.
translations.da: Kokken laver vores pizzaer i aften.
translations.ja: 料理人は今夜私たちのピザを作ります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'cuisinier' and marks definiteness.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb 'prépare' (profession/job).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Le cuisinier'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; modifies 'pizzas' and indicates possession; used with a plural noun.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'prépare'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' in the temporal expression 'ce soir' (tonight).
Common noun, masculine singular; adverbial time complement in the expression 'ce soir'.

sentences.target: Je connais un cuisinier près d’ici.

translations.fr: Je connais un cuisinier près d’ici.
translations.es: Conozco a un cocinero cerca de aquí.
translations.de: Ich kenne einen Koch in der Nähe.
translations.zh-Hans: 我认识一位附近的厨师。
translations.yue: 我識一個喺附近嘅廚師。
translations.pt: Eu conheço um cozinheiro aqui perto.
translations.vi: Tôi biết một đầu bếp ở gần đây.
translations.nl: Ik ken een kok hier in de buurt.
translations.hi: मैं पास में एक रसोइए को जानता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner en kokk i nærheten.
translations.id: Saya kenal seorang koki di dekat sini.
translations.sv: Jag känner en kock här i närheten.
translations.da: Jeg kender en kok i nærheden.
translations.ja: 近くの料理人を知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; clitic-like in position; subject of 'connais'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking 'un cuisinier' as its object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the non-specific noun 'cuisinier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'connais'.
Adverb of proximity; combines with 'de' to form the locative phrase 'près de …'.
Preposition 'de' contracted before a vowel; introduces the complement 'ici' in 'près d’ici'.
Adverb of place; complement to 'de' within the locative expression 'près d’ici'.

translations.es: El cocinero llega hacia el mediodía.
translations.pt: O cozinheiro chega por volta do meio-dia.
translations.vi: Đầu bếp đến vào khoảng trưa.
translations.nl: De kok kommt rond het middaguur.
translations.hi: रसोइया दोपहर के आस-पास पहुँचता है.
translations.el: Ο μάγειρας φτάνει γύρω στο μεσημέρι.
translations.ja: 料理人は正午ごろに到着します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; marks the noun 'cuisinier' as definite.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'arrive'.
Intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition; introduces an approximate time complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'vers'; temporal complement.

sentences.target: On cherche un cuisinier pour demain.

translations.fr: On cherche un cuisinier pour demain.
translations.en: We’re looking for a cook for tomorrow.
translations.de: Wir suchen für morgen einen Koch.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在为明天寻找一位厨师。
translations.yue: 我哋搵緊一位聽日可以開工嘅廚師。
translations.pt: Estamos à procura de um cozinheiro para amanhã.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một đầu bếp cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: We zoeken een kok voor morgen.
translations.hi: हम कल के लिए एक रसोइया ढूँढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en kokk til i morgen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari seorang koki untuk besok.
translations.sv: Vi söker en kock till i morgon.
translations.da: Vi søger en kok til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日働ける料理人を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; often used colloquially for 'we'; syntactically 3rd person singular.
Transitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'cuisinier' as a non-specific referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition; introduces a temporal frame/purpose ('pour demain').
Adverb of time; functions as the complement of 'pour' to indicate a deadline or scheduling.
